description_long: This house consists of two distinct, modern-style residential buildings set side by side, each with a flat roof and large windows. The left building features a tan wooden facade, a prominent garage with a white van parked outside, and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The right building is taller, with a gray and white exterior, multiple balconies, and lush greenery including trees and shrubs at the base. Both structures have rooftop spaces, with the right building showcasing a partially covered terrace and visible outdoor furniture. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The landscaping includes a small lawn, paved walkways, and decorative plants, enhancing the urban residential appeal.
description: A pair of modern, flat-roofed houses with large windows, rooftop terraces, and landscaped surroundings. The design features wood and concrete facades, balconies, and a driveway with a parked van.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tan wooden house with a garage, driveway, and van, alongside the taller gray house with balconies and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the buildings, rooftop terrace on the gray house, and minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades, large windows on the tan house, and the covered terrace on the gray house.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with the main entrances, driveway, van, and a clear look at the rooftop and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a flat overhang, paved steps, and a garage integrated into the facade
